targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (1.0 - COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*)::float FROM module_results WHERE status = 'ok' AND (COALESCE((metrics->>'total_issues')::int, 0) + COALESCE((metrics->>'total_anomalies')::int, 0)) > 0 AND $__timeFilter(ts)), 0) / GREATEST((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT src)::float FROM headers WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)), 1)), 1) AS security_score;

SELECT mr.ts AS time, mr.module_name AS module, COALESCE(mr.metrics->>'bssid', mr.metrics->>'device_mac', 'N/A') AS device, CASE WHEN COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_issues')::int, 0) > 5 THEN 'critical' WHEN COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_issues')::int, 0) > 2 THEN 'high' WHEN COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_issues')::int, (mr.metrics->>'total_anomalies')::int, 0) > 0 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS severity, mr.summary AS description FROM module_results mr WHERE mr.status = 'ok' AND (COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_issues')::int, 0) + COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_anomalies')::int, 0)) > 0 AND $__timeFilter(mr.ts) ORDER BY mr.ts DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT DISTINCT mr.metrics->>'mitre_ttp' AS technique_id, mr.module_name AS detected_by, COUNT(*) AS trigger_count, MAX(mr.ts) AS last_triggered FROM module_results mr WHERE mr.metrics->>'mitre_ttp' IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(mr.ts) GROUP BY mr.metrics->>'mitre_ttp', mr.module_name ORDER BY trigger_count DESC;

SELECT SPLIT_PART(mr.module_name, '.', 1) AS protocol, COUNT(*) AS finding_count FROM module_results mr WHERE mr.status = 'ok' AND (COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_issues')::int, 0) + COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_anomalies')::int, 0)) > 0 AND $__timeFilter(mr.ts) GROUP BY SPLIT_PART(mr.module_name, '.', 1) ORDER BY finding_count DESC;

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', first_seen) AS time, protocol AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT src, protocol, MIN(ts) AS first_seen FROM headers WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) GROUP BY src, protocol) sub GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT COALESCE(mr.metrics->>'bssid', mr.metrics->>'device_mac', 'unknown') AS device, SPLIT_PART(mr.module_name, '.', 1) AS protocol, COUNT(DISTINCT mr.module_name) AS modules_flagged, SUM(COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_issues')::int, (mr.metrics->>'total_anomalies')::int, 1)) AS total_findings, ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT mr.module_name) AS modules, MAX(mr.ts) AS last_assessment FROM module_results mr WHERE mr.status = 'ok' AND (COALESCE(mr.metrics->>'bssid', mr.metrics->>'device_mac') IS NOT NULL) AND (COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_issues')::int, 0) + COALESCE((mr.metrics->>'total_anomalies')::int, 0)) > 0 AND $__timeFilter(mr.ts) GROUP BY COALESCE(mr.metrics->>'bssid', mr.metrics->>'device_mac', 'unknown'), SPLIT_PART(mr.module_name, '.', 1) ORDER BY total_findings DESC LIMIT 20;
